title: Polymer clay faux druzy crystal pendant
notes: A pendant approximately 40 mm wide with a cavity filled with glitter gel and clear resin top, or — the fully polymer approach — a rough surface created by pressing fine glass microbeads or coarse sugar-texture into the uncured clay surface before baking. Backed with a smooth polymer sheet. After curing, sealed with resin or gloss varnish to give a wet crystal-cluster appearance.
